Name: Abhinay Khalatkar
Canonical: https://abhinay-portfolio.web.app/en
Current Positioning: Senior Full-Stack Software Developer (10+ years experience)

Professional Summary:
Abhinay Khalatkar is a senior full-stack engineer focused on scalable web product delivery. His work spans frontend architecture, backend API design, CMS integration, and system design decisions for long-term maintainability. He works with modern JavaScript/TypeScript stacks and combines test-driven engineering discipline with agentic AI workflows to accelerate delivery quality and speed.

Core Expertise:
- Scalable system design and software architecture
- React, Next.js, TypeScript, Node.js
- Craft CMS and custom API endpoint integrations
- Performance-focused, responsive UI engineering
- CI-ready workflows, test-driven development, production hardening
- AI-assisted engineering with GitHub Copilot and OpenAI Codex

Anonymized Architecture Case Studies:
- Enterprise Commerce Platform:
  Hybrid Craft CMS + React SPA architecture with secure GraphQL proxying, multilingual route resolution, and canonical URL validation.
- Secure Deployment Orchestration Service:
  Authenticated deployment control plane with SSE observability, guarded command execution, rollback safety, and staged promotion.
- Modular Content Platform:
  Custom Craft module architecture with structured configuration and maintainable frontend asset pipeline boundaries.
- Reusable Full-Stack Boilerplate System:
  Standardized TypeScript + React + Craft foundation enabling faster setup, upgrade-safe merges, and environment-aware delivery.

Selected Experience:
- Associate Software Developer, scribble Werbeagentur GmbH (Apr 2024 - Present)
  Architected reusable React + Craft CMS boilerplates, engineered Next.js apps, integrated CMS APIs, and led end-to-end project execution.
- Software Developer (Work Study), wob AG (Mar 2022 - Sep 2023)
  Built interactive React components, optimized multipage architecture, integrated PIMCORE CMS and Salesforce workflows.
- Jr. Frontend Developer (Internship), AK Advertising (Jan 2018 - Mar 2018)
  Implemented SPA improvements, Firebase-backed dynamic data flows, and REST API client integrations.

Education:
- Masters in Applied Computer Science, SRH Hochschule Heidelberg
- Bachelor of Computer Application, Nagpur University
